title: Owl & Fox Shape Stacking Wooden Topple Tower, Traditional Stacking Montessori Developmental Toy for Infants and Toddlers 12 months+, FSC Certified, 19.5 (h) x 10 cm
features: The Owl & Fox range from TP Toys is here to transform your child’s indoor space into a beautiful active play area. The Wooden Topple tower has been designed to complement your home environment, allowing maximum play fun whilst looking great

Stack, wobble, and topple with the Wooden Topple Tower! Little ones will love exploring all the different colours and arrangements as they play and explore. Then, as they grow, they will love learning to stack the tower in the right order, learning all about sizes, sequences, and sorting as they play!
Variety of colourful rings to stack, topple, and more. Develops hand-eye coordination & problem-solving skills

The perfect choice for little hands, the fun is endless and perfect for developing hand eye coordination. The Owl & Fox range has been designed and developed to inspire confidence and independent play from an early age. Enhancing gross motor skills development and cognitive growth

Sustainable, traditional, and stylish. Made from FSC certified wood. Wooden Topple tower complete with coloured shaped rings. Beautifully simple aesthetic to compliment your home. Suitable for 12 months +, Built dimensions: 10 x19.5cm (H)
description: From the manufacturer Toys For All Ages The Owl & Fox range fuels the flames of creativity for your little ones. From 12+ months, this range serves as a catalyst for imaginative play and the development of motor skills. Embrace the magic of make-believe and witness as your child's fantasies come to life. Owl & Fox isn't just a toy range; it's a gateway to a world where dreams take centre stage, and play knows no bounds. Why Choose Owl & Fox? Enhances Motor Skills We understand the importance of fine motor skills development, which is why our range is expertly designed to enhance coordination, grip, strength, and overall motor skills. Inspires Confidence Owl & Fox toys are more than just playthings; they are confidence boosters. Watch as your child beams with pride, mastering new challenges and achieving small victories. Beautifully Aesthetic Elevate your playroom with the timeless beauty of the Owl & Fox range. Each piece is a combination of form and function, keeping little ones entertained and your home looking its best. Unleash The Imagination The Owl & Fox range offers an exciting array of play kitchens, workbenches, dolls houses, and more. Let your little ones soar into a realm where every moment is an exhilarating adventure just waiting to unfold! Unleash the power of play with Owl & Fox—where little friends go on big adventures! Owl & Fox Wooden Kitchen Set Owl & Fox Wooden Rainmaker Owl & Fox Wooden Vehicle Transporter Owl & Fox Wooden Pancake Set Owl & Fox Wooden Baby Walker with Bricks Owl & Fox Wooden Tool Caddy Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.8 out of 5 stars 15 4.2 out of 5 stars 44 5.0 out of 5 stars 5 4.6 out of 5 stars 47 4.2 out of 5 stars 51 5.0 out of 5 stars 2 Price £67.36 £ 67 . 36 — no data £13.04 £ 13 . 04 £11.00 £ 11 . 00 £29.89 £ 29 . 89 £11.94 £ 11 . 94 Age 3+ Years 12+ Months 3+ Years 3+ Years 12+ Months 3+ Years Material FSC Wood FSC Wood FSC Wood FSC Wood FSC Wood FSC Wood Sustainable ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Product Description Have your little chef prepare to cook up a storm with the Wooden Kitchen Set! Complete with a sink, hobs, taps, accessories, and more. Ideally shaped for small hands, twist, shake and roll to reveal the hidden sounds, enhancing their imagination. Perfect for little car enthusiasts, take care to load all four cars onto the truck to start the journey and shift into play mode. Inspiring imaginative play and allowing storytelling skills to flourish. Not just for pancake day this wooden set encourages little chefs all year round, flip the pancakes, choose the toppings and drizzle the sauce. Encourage your child’s creativity and motor skills with this wooden baby walker. Including colourful building blocks to help them build and create all afternoon long! The ideal set for a little handyman in the making. Bolt into action, no job is too big or too small with this Wooden Tool Caddy at hand.
